raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX we had a conference call with CITI and XXXX at XXXX XXXX. We were told they would be returning the money. On XX/XX/XXXX we had another conference call and XXXX sent letters stating her company 's billing dept had made an error and since I canceled the policy I should get the {$600.00} back. We were again told I should receive the credit in a few days. On XX/XX/XXXX I talked to a rude condescending supervisor at CITI. On XX/XX/XXXX I talked to XXXX, XXXX, and XXXX and he said I should have the money in 2 days but it could take 2 weeks. On XX/XX/XXXX XXXX at CITI and XXXX at XXXX and I had a third conference call at XXXX 's request and we were assured the money should be returned. On XX/XX/XXXX I called and talked to XXXX and XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX I talked to XXXX and XXXX and was told I WOULD get the money back by Friday XX/XX/XXXX! On XX/XX/XXXX I talked to XXXX on XXXX XXXX and she said XXXX sent me an email and he should be calling me. His response in the email was that I opened the dispute with the incorrect reasoning, It seemed like it was my best choice of drop down boxes onXXXX! He has not called yet. According to the Insurance documents the CITI payment on XX/XX/XXXX was not accepted which started this whole problem! I disputed this issue 2 times because I was stuck between these 2 agencies! 40 phone calls have failed to produce anything, many of these were an hour or more.
